summary: NVDA dropped ~10% in past week. News: OpenAI investment stalled, AI competition concerns. 5 trading days horizon. Monte Carlo: zero-drift=50%, recent-drift=33%, but drift is NOT statistically significant (t=-1.06, p=0.30). Near coin-flip.
content: NVDA close prices: dropped from ~192 (Jan 29) to ~172 (Feb 5), ~10% decline in 5 trading days. Catalysts: OpenAI $100B investment stalled (CNBC Feb 2), AI competition disruptor concerns (Motley Fool Feb 4). Feb 14 is Saturday so resolution uses Feb 13 close. 5 trading days from Feb 6 close. Annualized vol ~26.6%, 5-day vol ~3.75%. Recent mean daily return -0.33% but not statistically significant.
